content.query:
IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.PassengerCountStats', 'U') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE dbo.PassengerCountStats;
GO

SELECT 
    passengerCount as PassengerCount,
    SUM(tripDistance) as SumTripDistance_miles,
    AVG(tripDistance) as AvgTripDistance_miles
INTO dbo.PassengerCountStats
FROM dbo.YellowTaxi2019
WHERE tripDistance > 0 AND passengerCount > 0
GROUP BY passengerCount;
GO

SELECT * FROM dbo.PassengerCountStats
ORDER BY PassengerCount;
